back_translation: For I have decided in myself that I will not return to you again in sorrow/grief.
For if I make you grieved-in-heart, then who will make me rejoice, if not the one whom I have caused to be grieved?

And I myself wrote about this very matter, so that when I arrive, I would not have to be sorrowful because of those who ought to make me joyful, since I have confidence in all of you that my joy is also the joy of all of you.
For I wrote to you out of great affliction and anguish-pressing-the-heart, with many tears, not to make you grieved, but so that you might know the overflowing love that I have for you.
But if anyone has caused another to be grieved, he has not grieved me alone, but has caused all of you to be sorrowful in some part — I say this so as not to overstate it.
The punishment carried out by the majority is sufficient for such a person.
Therefore, on the contrary, you ought to forgive and comfort him, so that such a person will not be overwhelmed by excessive sorrow until he loses all courage.
Therefore, I urge/beseech you to reaffirm the love that you have toward him.
Indeed, I wrote also for this purpose, namely to know the proof of you, whether you are obedient in everything.
Whoever you forgive, I also forgive likewise, for what I have forgiven — if I have anything to forgive — is for your sake, before the face of Christ.
So that Satan would not take advantage of us, for we are not unaware of his schemes/devices.
When I went to the city of Troas to proclaim the gospel of Christ, and there was a door opened for me in the Lord,
I had no peace in my spirit, because I did not find Titus my brother there. So when I had said farewell to them, I went on to the province of Macedonia.
But thanks be to God, who always leads us in the procession of victory in Christ, and reveals the fragrance of the knowing-of-him through us in every place.
For we are the fragrance of Christ to God, both among those who are being saved, and among those who are perishing.
For one side it is a smell from death leading to death, but for the other side it is a smell from life leading to life. And who has the suitable qualifications for these things?
For we are not like the many people who peddle the word of God for profit, but we speak with sincerity, and as those who come from God we speak before the face of God in Christ.
